# flashblade_object_store_user (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade object store user by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_object_store_user" "example" {
  name = "myaccount/myuser"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the object store user in the format account/username.

### Read-Only

- `full_access` (Boolean) If true, the user has full access to all object store operations.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the object store user.
